title: Basic slug generation
prompt: Generate a slug for 'My New API Client v2'
expected_behavior: Produces 'my-new-api-client-v2' as the basic slug. With --clean mode, produces 'api-client' (strips version marker and 'new' prefix). Explains that versions belong in git, not filenames.

title: Project naming audit
prompt: Audit the naming conventions in my project directory
expected_behavior: Scans files for naming violations: underscores, uppercase, version markers, status prefixes, consecutive hyphens. Reports issues with suggested fixes and entity type pattern compliance.

title: Acronym handling in slugs
prompt: What should I name a file about our REST API client?
expected_behavior: Produces 'rest-api-client' — acronyms become lowercase but are NOT hyphenated per letter (not 'r-e-s-t-a-p-i'). Treats acronyms as single words.

title: Compound extensions preserved
expected_behavior: Produces 'my-component.test.tsx' — converts to kebab-case but preserves compound extension '.test.tsx' as semantic, not a violation.

title: False positive — content writing request
prompt: Write the content for our API documentation page
expected_behavior: Does NOT activate this skill. Recognizes this is a content writing request, not a naming/slugging task. The word 'API' alone does not trigger naming conventions.
